decks.name: Best Picture Winners
decks.description: Every Academy Award Best Picture winner, from Wings at the first ceremony (1927/28) to One Battle After Another (2025). Each card pairs the film with its director and the story behind the win.

decks.name: Who Directed It?
decks.description: See a famous film, name its director: 129 essentials from Citizen Kane and Casablanca to Parasite and Everything Everywhere All at Once. Spans Hollywood classics, New Hollywood, modern blockbusters, world cinema, and animation.
